interface.name: ${olt\-infrastructure\-name}-cpartition
interface.tm-root:
<#if tc2q\-profile\-name?has_content>
            ${tc2q\-profile\-name}
          </#if>
            <#if intermediate\-scheduler\-name?has_content>
            
              ${intermediate\-scheduler\-name}
              
              ${leaf\-scheduler\-name}
              <#if weight?has_content>		  
              ${weight}
              </#if>
              
            
            <#else>
            
              ${leaf\-scheduler\-name}
              <#if weight?has_content>		  
              ${weight}
              </#if>
            			
            </#if>

            
              ${leaf\-scheduler\-name}
              20
            <#if shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
              ${shaper\-profile\-name}
             </#if>
              true
              <#if queue0\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue0\-priority?has_content>
              
                0
                ${queue0\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue0\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue0\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue0\-priority}
		    	<#if queue0\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue0\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>
              <#if queue1\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue1\-priority?has_content>
              
                1
                ${queue1\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue1\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue1\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue1\-priority}
		    	<#if queue1\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue1\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>		  
              <#if queue2\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue2\-priority?has_content>
              
                2
                ${queue2\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue2\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue2\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue2\-priority}
		    	<#if queue2\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue2\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>
              <#if queue3\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue3\-priority?has_content>
              
                3
                ${queue3\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue3\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue3\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue3\-priority}
		    	<#if queue3\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue3\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>
              <#if queue4\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue4\-priority?has_content>
              
                4
                ${queue4\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue4\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue4\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue4\-priority}
		    	<#if queue4\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue4\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>		
              <#if queue5\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue5\-priority?has_content>
              
                5
                ${queue5\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue5\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue5\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue5\-priority}
		    	<#if queue5\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue5\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>		
              <#if queue6\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue6\-priority?has_content>
              
                6
                ${queue6\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue6\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue6\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue6\-priority}
		    	<#if queue6\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue6\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>
              <#if queue7\-bac\-profile\-name?has_content && queue7\-priority?has_content>
              
                7
                ${queue7\-bac\-profile\-name}
          		<#if queue7\-shaper\-profile\-name?has_content>
                ${queue7\-shaper\-profile\-name}
		    	</#if>
                ${queue7\-priority}
		    	<#if queue7\-weight?has_content>			
                ${queue7\-weight}
		    	</#if>
              
		      </#if>
